episodes.title: A decaying jet once owned by Jeffrey Epstein sits in a Georgia scrapyard. Here’s a look inside
episodes.description:
A Boeing 727 passenger jet previously owned by Jeffrey Epstein has been sitting for years, decaying in a scrapyard at Brunswick Golden Isles Airport in Glynn County, and News4JAX was granted permission to tour the plane on Monday.

Welcome to the official YouTube channel of WJXT News4JAX - The Local Station.

Covering Jacksonville, Florida, and surrounding communities with trusted, accurate, and impactful journalism, our mission is to keep you informed with stories that matter.
